# Cmprly

> Independent, structured comparisons of software & SaaS. Side-by-side tables, pricing breakdowns at every tier, and unbiased tool rankings based on publicly verifiable data.

## Latest comparisons

- [Kit vs Mailchimp vs Brevo](https://cmprly.com/compare/kit-vs-mailchimp-vs-brevo/): Which email marketing tool wins for creators in 2026?
- [Kit Review 2026](https://cmprly.com/compare/kit-review-2026/): The creator's email marketing platform — free plan, automation, commerce.
- [Brevo Review 2026](https://cmprly.com/compare/brevo-review-2026/): The budget email marketing powerhouse with send-volume pricing.
- [Email Marketing Automation Tools Compared](https://cmprly.com/compare/email-marketing-automation-tools-compared/): Kit vs Mailchimp vs Brevo vs ActiveCampaign.

## Best-of guides

- [Best Email Marketing for Solopreneurs](https://cmprly.com/best/best-email-marketing-for-solopreneurs/): 5 tools compared for creators, freelancers, and one-person businesses.
- [Email Marketing Pricing: Real Cost at Every Tier](https://cmprly.com/best/email-marketing-pricing-real-cost/): 500 to 100K subscribers — what you actually pay.
